api_key.description: Retently API v2 key, sent as an Authorization: api_key=<api_key> header (legacy's connsdk.APIKeyHeader convention). Never logged.

base_url.description: Retently API base URL override for tests or proxies.

updated_after.description: Optional passthrough filter: only return customers/surveys/campaigns updated at or after this value.

created_after.description: Optional passthrough filter: only return responses created at or after this value.

email.description: Optional passthrough filter: scope the customers stream to a single customer email.

campaign_id.description: Optional passthrough filter: scope the responses stream to a single campaign id.
